title: UB64ToRaw
text: UB64ToRaw Decode a null terminated Base64 encoded string to raw data. extern long UB64ToRaw(const unsigned char * In , unsigned char * Out , long OutMaxLen ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description EncodedString IN Base64 encoded string that is to be decoded DecodedString OUT Decoded result OutMaxLen IN Maximum number of bytes that can be written to Out Return Values Value Meaning < 0 Not all characters have been decoded. ( -1 x ReturnValue ) have been decoded. 0 Failed to decode in base64 > 0 All characters have been decoded. The value is the actual length of the output data. Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data. Related Links URawToB64 Encode raw data in Base64 format Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
